productDisplayName: BIBA Women Sliver Stripes Blue Kurta
description: Composition Blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a slit, sequin and embroidery on the yoke, three-quarter sleeves with printed piping along the cuffs, silver stripes and a vented hem with printed piping on the inner of the vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print that makes it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the colourful embroidery adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
